are_you_ok.title: Taylor Farms recalls lettuce shipped to 27 states over cyclospora risk
are_you_ok.summary: Lettuce recall over cyclospora shipped to 27 states including area — a public-health/food-safety exposure the reader could plausibly be affected by. Check-in worthy.
